creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've been trying to keep Qt4 support but it's getting harder and harder.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/431852
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/434552
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/435797

As I threatened earlier, I think it's time to let go of Qt4 support.  Do we really want to keep going like this?
